steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Less obvious cue: rearranging a store’s layout

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The correct answer should illustrate how shoppers moved through more of the store unexpectedly due to changed layouts. Choice A explains precisely this phenomenon, noting the shopper encountered an additional purchase opportunity through exploration. The other options either describe planned shopping lists not being fulfilled or external offers guiding purchases. This matches choice A — A is correct.
